evals.prompt: Write integration tests for a LangChain agent that uses the OpenAI_functions agent type. Include a test that verifies tool calling behavior with a real LLM.
evals.expected_output: Integration test file with @pytest.mark.integration, API key check fixture, and structural assertions
expectations: Asserts on tool call names, not exact output text
Uses smaller model like gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview for cost efficiency

evals.prompt: Add integration tests for a RetrievalQA chain that uses a Chroma vector store. Write tests that verify the chain correctly retrieves and answers questions.
evals.expected_output: Integration test class with conftest.py setup for API keys and pytest markers
expectations: Asserts on response structure (has messages, correct types)
Loads API keys from environment or .env

evals.prompt: Set up VCR recording for integration tests in a LangChain project. Show the conftest.py configuration and a sample test with @pytest.mark.vcr decorator.
evals.expected_output: conftest.py with vcr_config fixture and example test using @pytest.mark.vcr
expectations: vcr_config filters authorization and api_key headers
Test asserts on tool call structure, not exact content
